title: Yan Lu
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Yan Lu
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
published_college: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

organizational_affiliations.label: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

biography: Dr. Yan Lu is an Assistant Professor of Computer Science in the Department of Physics, Computer Science, and Engineering at Christopher Newport University, where she joined in Fall 2023. Prior to her appointment at CNU, she served as a Research Assistant Professor at the Virginia Modeling Analysis and Simulation Center at Old Dominion University and as a Research Scientist at the Virginia Commonwealth Cyber Initiative. Dr. Lu earned her Ph.D. in Computational Modeling and Simulation Engineering from Old Dominion University in 2020, an M.Sc. in Computer Science from Virginia Commonwealth University in 2009, an M.Sc. in Circuit and System from the Chinese Academy of Sciences in 2007, and a B.A. in Computer Science from Beijing Jiaotong University in 2004. Her current research primarily focuses on Deep Learning, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence and their applications in Remote Sensing Image Processing and Trustworthy AI. She is an active member of prestigious professional organizations including IEEE and ACM, as well as its Special Interest Group onSimulation (SIGSIM). In 2019, Dr. Lu received the Gene Newman Award for Excellence in Modeling and Simulation Research from Old Dominion University. Her work on Deep Learning for Effective Refugee Tent Extraction using Satellite Images was featured in the world-leading engineering magazine, IEEE Spectrum in 2020. Dr. Lu was honored with the Summer Visiting Faculty Research Program (VFRP) awards from the Air Force Research Lab InformationDirectorate in Rome, New York starting from 2020. This recognition further highlights her contributions to the field of research and academia. Personal website: https://sites.google.com/view/dr-yan-lu/home

MCS in Computer Science, Virginia Commonwealth University
BCS in Computer Science, Beijing Jiao Tong University
research_interests: Machine Learning, Deep Learning and its applications in Image/Remote Sensing Image Processing
teaching_interests: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Image Processing, Data Science, Data Analysis
